properties.name: worker.enabled
properties.description: Enables the RabbitMQ worker listener that consumes workflow tasks.

properties.name: worker.queue-poll-interval-ms
properties.description: Polling interval used by the scheduler to scan for executable workflow steps.

properties.name: worker.max-retry-attempts
properties.description: Default maximum retry attempts for a workflow step when retryConfig is not provided in the workflow definition.

properties.name: worker.retry-backoff-multiplier
properties.description: Default exponential backoff multiplier for retries when retryConfig is not provided in the workflow definition.

properties.name: worker.initial-retry-delay-ms
properties.description: Default initial delay in milliseconds before retrying a workflow step when retryConfig is not provided in the workflow definition.

properties.name: scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Enables scheduled publishing of ready workflow steps onto the worker task queue.
